# Good Fixture

## When to use this skill

Use this skill when you need to extract a glossary from replay logs and produce a markdown file. The reader should decide in 5 seconds based on this section.

## Composition

This skill is invoked by: orch-plan. After this skill, invoke release-readiness skill.

## Overview

This is a fixture skill that satisfies every required check in the EVOKORE authoring contract.
